memories.value: First run. Query sre_findings and de_findings to discover infrastructure components. Establish security baseline from North Star security_policy. Begin tracking secret rotation dates.
Will build vulnerability inventory from infrastructure findings and tech stack analysis across first 3 runs.
Will populate secret rotation tracking as secrets are discovered in infrastructure findings. Check rotation_baseline in North Star for target intervals.
Will learn recurring security patterns, common misconfigurations, and false positive signatures over time.
